seoTitle: Roanoke County Public Schools Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks, PDF & Important Dates
seoDescription: View the Roanoke County Public Schools Calendar 2026-2027 with Aug 13 first day, May 27 last day, RCPS holidays, Winter Break, Spring Break, graduation dates, teacher workdays, PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: Roanoke County Public Schools starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 13, 2026. Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, Spring Break runs March 22-26, and the last day of school is May 27, 2027. The calendar lists 178 total student days and includes early dismissals, grading periods, high school virtual learning days, graduation ceremonies, and make-up day notes.

customSections.label: 2026-2027 RCPS Calendar Overview
customSections.content: The Roanoke County Public Schools 2026-2027 academic calendar includes 178 student days, districtwide school holidays, scheduled breaks, teacher workdays, grading periods, early dismissals, high school virtual learning days, graduation events, and make-up day procedures. RCPS follows a traditional school-year calendar for families in Roanoke County and the Roanoke Valley, so this page is useful for planning transportation, childcare, vacations, appointments, senior-year activities, and academic milestones around districtwide dates. This overview helps families understand the RCPS school schedule beyond the first day and last day of school while still checking school-specific programs and weather-related changes with the district.

groups.label: Calendar Coverage
items: Student attendance days and districtwide school holidays.
Teacher workdays, conference days, and make-up day candidates.
Grading period dates, report card dates, and academic checkpoints.
Graduation ceremonies and end-of-year schedule notes.

groups.label: Why This Matters
items: The RCPS academic calendar is used for vacation planning, childcare, transportation, appointments, and senior-year activities.
Families should still confirm school-specific events, weather make-up decisions, and program calendars directly with RCPS.

groups.label: How to Use This Calendar
items: Use the key dates for quick planning, then check the full date list for teacher workdays, grading periods, early dismissals, and make-up day notes.
Download the ICS file if you want RCPS dates in Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook, but verify district changes before making time-sensitive plans.
Use the official PDF link when you need the district source document for school forms, travel planning, or senior-year scheduling.

customSections.label: Roanoke County Public Schools 2026-2027 Calendar Highlights
customSections.content: The 2026-2027 RCPS school calendar follows a traditional academic schedule with 178 total student days, scheduled breaks, teacher workdays, early dismissals, grading periods, high school virtual learning days, and graduation ceremonies.

groups.label: Key Planning Periods
items: First student day: Thursday, August 13, 2026.
First semester ends: Friday, December 18, 2026.
Winter Break: Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027.
Spring Break: Monday, March 22 through Friday, March 26, 2027.
Graduation ceremonies: Tuesday, May 25 and Wednesday, May 26, 2027.
Last student day: Thursday, May 27, 2027.

groups.label: Planning Notes
items: Teacher workdays and make-up day candidates may affect childcare and travel plans.
Three-hour early dismissals should be tracked separately because dismissal timing may vary by school level.
High school virtual learning days apply only to high schools, so families should confirm campus-level expectations.

customSections.label: Planning Guide for Roanoke County Families
customSections.content: Families can use the RCPS 2026-2027 calendar to plan vacations, childcare, transportation, appointments, senior-year events, and school activities around districtwide dates.

groups.label: Vacation Planning
items: Winter Break and Spring Break are the clearest districtwide travel windows for students.
Families should review the RCPS make-up day schedule before booking travel near January, February, and March teacher workdays.

groups.label: Childcare and Transportation
items: Three-hour early dismissals are listed separately from holidays and may require different transportation or childcare arrangements.
Conference days and teacher workdays may close schools for students even when staff are working.

groups.label: Graduation Planning
items: Graduation ceremonies are listed for May 25-26, 2027.
Families of seniors should confirm ceremony assignments and school-specific graduation details directly with RCPS.

groups.label: Calendar Changes
items: Weather closures, make-up days, and school board updates can change the practical school schedule.
Use the official RCPS academic calendar page for final confirmation before making time-sensitive plans.

customSections.label: Calendar Updates and Weather Closures
customSections.content: Roanoke County school calendar changes can happen because of weather closures, emergency schedule changes, school board decisions, or make-up day adjustments. MySchoolDates summarizes the reviewed RCPS academic calendar, but the district remains the source of record for final schedule changes.

groups.label: What Families Should Watch
items: Weather closures and make-up days may change how teacher workdays or scheduled breaks are used.
Three-hour early dismissals, high school virtual learning days, and conference dates may affect childcare and transportation.
Graduation assignments, school-specific events, and program calendars should be confirmed with the assigned school.

groups.label: How to Verify Changes
items: Check the official RCPS academic calendar page before making travel or childcare plans.
Review district announcements for emergency closures, snow days, and make-up day decisions.
Use the downloadable calendar file as a planning aid, not as an automatically updating official district calendar.

customSections.label: 2025-2026 vs 2026-2027 Roanoke County Calendar Changes
customSections.content: The current RCPS calendar keeps the same 178 total student days while shifting several major dates one calendar day earlier than the prior school year.

rows: Starts and ends one calendar day earlier
Starts and ends one calendar day earlier

customSections.label: Roanoke County Calendar Update History
customSections.content: This page is updated when reviewed RCPS calendar source material changes or when the MySchoolDates calendar file is regenerated.

groups.label: July 20, 2026
items: Verified key dates against the official Roanoke County Public Schools academic calendar PDF.
Generated the downloadable ICS calendar file from reviewed calendar records.
Reviewed make-up day notes, teacher workdays, early dismissals, and graduation dates for family planning context.

customSections.label: How We Verify Roanoke County Calendar Information
customSections.content: MySchoolDates reviews public district calendar sources before publishing searchable calendar pages and downloadable calendar files.

groups.label: Verification Steps
items: Check the official RCPS academic calendar page and official calendar PDF.
Compare first day, last day, breaks, holidays, teacher workdays, early dismissals, and graduation dates.
Convert reviewed records into a downloadable calendar file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.
Keep an independent disclaimer because RCPS remains the official source for final updates.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Roanoke County Public Schools start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first student day is Thursday, August 13, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Roanoke County Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 22 through Friday, March 26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Roanoke County in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school and end of second semester is Thursday, May 27, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When are RCPS graduation ceremonies in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists graduation ceremonies on May 25-26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Roanoke County Public Schools have school on Veterans Day?
calendarFaqs.a: The reviewed 2026-2027 RCPS calendar does not list a separate Veterans Day school closure in the important dates shown on this page. Families should verify school-specific observances and any district updates with RCPS.

calendarFaqs.q: How many days are students off during Winter Break?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs from Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027, covering 10 weekdays when students are not scheduled for school.
The 2026-2027 RCPS calendar lists teacher workdays on August 3, August 7, August 10-12, October 12, January 4, March 12, and May 28. Some dates are also listed in the official make-up day schedule.

calendarFaqs.q: Does RCPS have early dismissal days?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The calendar lists three-hour early dismissals on September 23, October 21, February 24, April 28, and May 27, plus graduation-related secondary early dismissals on May 25-26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in the RCPS 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The Roanoke County Public Schools 2026-2027 calendar lists 178 total student days.
